sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (product_id INT, sales_amount FLOAT, region VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO sales (product_id, sales_amount, region) VALUES (1, 100.0, 'North'), (2, 200.0, 'South'), (3, 150.0, 'East');
CREATE TABLE expenses (product_id INT, expense_amount FLOAT);
SELECT covar_pop(sales_amount, expense_amount) FROM sales JOIN expenses ON sales.product_id = expenses.product_id;
